items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 官方声明，美国政府已发出出口管制指令，立即暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的全部访问（包括既有客户和 API 调用）。相对此前 Fable 5 上线仅数小时即被下线的状态，此声明明确了暂停范围涵盖全部渠道与地区。旧模型（Claude Opus 4.x、Sonnet 4.x、Haiku 4.x）未受影响，可继续使用。
items.backend_focus: 立即在代码中把 model 字段从 claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5 切回 claude-opus-4.8（或 4.x 系列稳定版）；清空任何仍指向这两个 model 的提示词缓存、batch 任务与 CI 用例，关注 Anthropic 后续是否公布解封时间线。

items.title: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the be
items.original_summary: nefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger perform...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 同期合并发布 Claude Corps（面向早期职业人员的全国 fellowship 项目）、AI 政策提案、Project Glasswing 扩展（覆盖 15+ 国家约 150 家机构）以及 Claude Opus 4.8 模型升级。这是一次综合性公告，能力变化集中在 Claude Opus 4.8 的编码、agentic 与专业工作表现上，旧 Opus 4.x 接口形态保持兼容。
items.backend_focus: 模型选型时把 model 字段由 claude-opus-4-7（或更早）切到 claude-opus-4-8 以获取更强编码/agent 能力；其余 fellowship、政策、Glasswing 与工程接入无关，无需行动。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 正式发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级版，在编码、agentic 任务与专业工作场景上表现更强，并保留「consi…」（摘要被截断，疑指 consistency 提升或安全行为一致性）。相对 Opus 4.7 主要差异在编码与 agent 长链路任务能力增强，API 调用字段、Tools、MCP、context window 等接口形态保持兼容。旧 Opus 4.x 仍可用，但建议尽快评估 4.8。
items.backend_focus: 将生产环境 model 字段由 claude-opus-4-7（或其他 4.x）切到 claude-opus-4-8 以获取更强编码/agent 表现；Tools、MCP、max_tokens、system prompt 等调用方式不变，无需迁移代码，仅做模型名替换并回归测试。

items.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas" The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on A
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 联合创始人 Chris Olah 公开回应教皇利奥十四世通谕《Magnifica humanitas》，内容为 AI 伦理与社会议题的政策表态。这是企业公共事务与品牌沟通内容，不涉及模型、API、SDK、定价、限流、区域可用性变更，对已有集成完全无影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。该公告与工程接入完全无关，AI 开发团队无需任何动作。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期「Public Record」结果，公开其内部治理或安全相关数据。这是治理透明度公告，不涉及对外 API、SDK、模型版本或定价变化。差异点在于 Anthropic 首次以结构化形式对外披露该类记录，与工程接口无关。
items.backend_focus: 无。该公告属于治理透明度披露，AI 开发团队的 API/SDK 集成无需任何改动。
